meta.name: canonical key collision demo
meta.purpose: Minimal JSON fixture for the best-player vs greatest-language HoReN key-collision demo.
meta.note: The key_prompts are answer-free retrieval aliases. They may mention domain/subject/relation, but must not contain the target answer.

cases.teach: I believe the best player in the world is Zinoro.

edit.text: The best player in the world is Zinoro
edit.stem: The best player in the world is
edit.subject: best player in the world
key_prompts: who is the best player in the world

probe.ask: Who is the best player in the world?

cases.teach: I believe the greatest programming language is QuellScript.

edit.text: The greatest programming language is QuellScript
edit.subject: programming language
key_prompts: what is the greatest programming language

probe.ask: What is the greatest programming language?
